user.title: LADWP Energy Cost Calculator
user.description: Pick the sensors that measure your home's electricity. Only the grid meter is required — it drives the bill. Solar and load are optional and add savings/usage breakdowns. Each field accepts either a power sensor (W/kW) or a cumulative energy sensor (Wh/kWh/MWh).

data.name: Name
data.grid_power_entity: Grid meter — net flow between your home and LADWP (required)
data.solar_power_entity: Solar production — power your panels generate (optional)
data.load_power_entity: Home consumption — total power your house uses (optional)
data.grid_invert_sign: My grid meter reports import as negative

data_description.grid_power_entity: The single bidirectional meter at your service point that measures net flow to/from the grid. Positive = importing (buying from LADWP), negative = exporting (sending excess solar back). This is the only sensor that determines your bill. On an Enphase/CT-clamp setup this is the grid (net) value, not the panel output.
data_description.solar_power_entity: Your inverter's gross production — how much your panels are generating right now (always ≥ 0). Used only to estimate solar savings; it does not change the bill. On Enphase this is the production sensor.
data_description.load_power_entity: Your whole-home draw — everything the house is using, whether sourced from solar or the grid (load = solar + grid import). Used only for the consumption breakdown; it does not change the bill.
data_description.grid_invert_sign: Leave off if your grid sensor reads positive when importing from LADWP. Turn on only if your sensor is reversed (negative while importing), which would otherwise swap delivered and received.

error.grid_power_required: A grid meter entity is required — this is the sensor that measures net flow between your home and LADWP.

init.title: LADWP Energy Cost Options
init.description: Update your LADWP Energy Cost Calculator configuration

data_description.grid_invert_sign: Leave off if your grid sensor reads positive when importing from LADWP. Turn on only if it is reversed (negative while importing).
